factors.summary: Demand is negatively impacted in certain segments due to weather and inventory issues.

evidence.text: •Wet and cold weather delayed pool construction activity in several key markets during the first half of 2019. As a result of slower sell-through during the first half of 2019, inventory levels were not reduced to the levels we anticipated. We expect the financial results of Aquatic Systems for the remainder of 2019 to be negatively impacted as a result.
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Demand is negatively impacted due to weather and inventory issues, indicating a moderate headwind.

factors.summary: The company is successfully raising prices to mitigate inflationary cost increases.

evidence.text: •selective increases in selling prices to mitigate inflationary cost increases;

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Successfully raising prices to mitigate inflationary costs shows a positive development for revenue.

factors.summary: Organic revenue growth is limited or may decline due to market penetration challenges.

evidence.text: •We have identified specific product and geographic market opportunities that we find attractive and continue to pursue, both within and outside the U.S. We are reinforcing our businesses to more effectively address these opportunities through research and development and additional sales and marketing resources. Unless we successfully penetrate these markets, our core sales growth will likely be limited or may decline.
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Limited or declining growth due to market penetration challenges presents a moderate headwind.

factors.summary: Sales volume is declining in certain segments due to weather and inventory issues.

evidence.text: •decreased sales volume in our Aquatic Systems segment due to higher than anticipated inventory levels in some of our key distribution channels;

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Declining sales volume due to weather and inventory issues indicates a negative trend.

factors.summary: End markets are mixed, with some growing due to acquisitions and others slowing due to weather.

evidence.text: •increased sales due to the acquisitions of Aquion and Pelican in the first quarter of 2019; [...] •decreased sales volume in our Aquatic Systems segment and agriculture-related business in our Flow Technologies segment due to cold and wet weather in the first half of 2019 and higher than anticipated inventory levels in some of our key distribution channels;

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed market performance with some growth and some decline results in a neutral sentiment.

factors.summary: Input costs are rising, particularly labor and raw materials, creating margin pressure.

evidence.text: •inflationary increases related to labor costs and certain raw materials;

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Rising input costs create margin pressure, indicating a negative development.

factors.summary: Labor costs are increasing, contributing to margin pressure.

evidence.text: •inflationary increases related to labor costs and certain raw materials;

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Increasing labor costs contribute to margin pressure, showing a negative trend.

factors.summary: Margins are improving in some areas but compressed in others due to cost increases and mix issues.

evidence.text: The 1.4 and 0.3 percentage point increase s in gross profit as a percentage of sales in the third quarter and first nine months, respectively, of 2019 from 2018 was primarily driven by: [...] These increase s were partially offset by: [...] •unfavorable mix as a result of a core sales growth decrease in the higher margin Aquatic Systems segment;

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed margin performance with some improvements and compressions results in a neutral sentiment.

factors.summary: Cost reduction initiatives are delivering savings, partially offsetting cost increases.

evidence.text: •savings generated from restructuring and other lean initiatives;

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Cost reduction initiatives are successfully generating savings, indicating positive progress.

factors.summary: Productivity is improving due to lean and supply chain management initiatives.

evidence.text: •higher contribution margin as a result of savings generated from our PIMS initiatives, including lean and supply management practices.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Improving productivity through lean and supply chain initiatives supports positive sentiment.

factors.summary: Inventory levels are higher than anticipated in key distribution channels, posing a risk.

evidence.text: As a result of slower sell-through during the first half of 2019, inventory levels were not reduced to the levels we anticipated.
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Higher inventory levels pose a risk, indicating negative sentiment.

factors.summary: Proposed tax regulations may negatively impact financial condition.

evidence.text: •Proposed regulations as part of the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, enacted in the U.S. in December 2017, may place limitations on the deductibility of certain interest expense for U.S. tax purposes. These proposed regulations could materially adversely affect our financial condition, results of operations, cash flows or our effective tax rate in future reporting periods when enacted.
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Proposed tax regulations may negatively impact financial health, showing negative sentiment.

factors.summary: Management is pursuing growth through new products and markets, indicating confidence.

evidence.text: •Delivering our growth priorities through new products and global and market expansion, specifically in the areas of pool and residential and commercial water treatment especially through acquisitions and focus on China and Southeast Asia;
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Management's pursuit of growth indicates confidence, reflecting positive sentiment.

factors.summary: Near-term risks include weather impacts, inventory levels, and economic conditions.

evidence.text: •Wet and cold weather delayed pool construction activity in several key markets during the first half of 2019. [...] •the current economic environment will result in continuing price volatility for many of our raw materials, and we are uncertain as to the timing and impact of these market changes.
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Near-term risks like weather and economic conditions pose challenges, indicating negative sentiment.

factors.summary: Long-term strategy is focused on growth through innovation and market expansion.

evidence.text: •Optimizing our technological capabilities to increasingly generate innovative new products and advance digital transformation; and [...] •Building a growth culture and delivering on our commitments while living our Win Right values.
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Focus on innovation and market expansion shows a positive long-term strategy.

factors.summary: Key sensitivities include material costs, foreign exchange, and economic conditions.

evidence.text: •the impact of material cost and other inflation; [...] •unfavorable foreign currency effects; [...] •overall global economic and business conditions impacting our business, including the strength of housing and related markets;
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Sensitivities to material costs and economic conditions present risks, indicating negative sentiment.

factors.summary: Acquisitions and new product introductions are catalysts for growth.

evidence.text: •the impact of the Aquion and Pelican acquisitions.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Acquisitions and new products are clearly driving growth.

factors.summary: Construction activity is a headwind due to weather impacts.

evidence.text: •Wet and cold weather delayed pool construction activity in several key markets during the first half of 2019.
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Weather delays indicate a significant headwind.

factors.summary: Dealer inventory levels are high, indicating potential weakening demand.

evidence.text: •higher than anticipated inventory levels in some of our key distribution channels;
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: High inventory suggests weakening demand.

factors.summary: Debt levels are increasing, leading to higher interest expenses.

evidence.text: The 60.5 percent increase in net interest expense in the third quarter of 2019 from 2018 was primarily driven by: [...] •the impact of higher average outstanding debt levels during the third quarter of 2019, compared to the same period in 2018.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Higher debt leads to increased interest expenses.

factors.summary: Acquisitions are contributing to growth, with successful integration.

evidence.text: •the impact of the Aquion and Pelican acquisitions.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Successful acquisitions contribute to growth.

factors.summary: Economic conditions are a headwind due to inflation and weather impacts.

evidence.text: •the current economic environment will result in continuing price volatility for many of our raw materials, and we are uncertain as to the timing and impact of these market changes.
evidence.subsection: Key Trends and Uncertainties Regarding Our Existing Business

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Inflation and weather impact economic stability.

factors.summary: Foreign exchange movements are negatively impacting results.

evidence.text: •unfavorable foreign currency effects;

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Unfavorable currency effects harm results.
